title: John A. and Cynthia Fry Gunn Theater at Legion of Honor Museum - Museum / Gallery in in San Francisco, CA | The Vendry
content: Browse more Museums / Galleries in San Francisco, CA. # John A. and Cynthia Fry Gunn Theater. ## Located In:Legion of Honor Museum. ## Legion of Honor Museum. ##### Address. 100 34th Avenue San Francisco, CA 94121. ##### Capacity. ##### F&B Options. ##### Equipment. ##### Features. ##### Frequent Uses. ##### Overview. Our lovely Gunn Theater has 316 seats, a fully-equipped stage and AV services including lighting, sound, and projection. Perfect for presentations, awards, and offsite meetings; either alone or in conjunction with a reception area for food and drink. Pricing dependent upon daytime or evening. This historic theater is available for an indoor ceremony. With backstage dressing rooms, the couple will have access to prepare for their moment on stage. Please note that food and beverage are not allowed in the theater. ##### Photos from Previous Events at Legion of Honor Museum.
